message:
feat(tui): display current git branch in interactive footer status bar

src/interactive.rs:
- Add read_git_branch(cwd) helper that reads .git/HEAD to determine
  current branch name — returns 'main', 'feature/foo', or 7-char
  short SHA for detached HEAD, None if not a git repo
- Add git_branch: Option<String> field to PiApp
- Initialize git_branch on startup via read_git_branch

src/interactive/agent.rs:
- Refresh git_branch after each agent turn completes (tool execution
  may create/switch branches)

src/interactive/view.rs:
- Append '  |  {branch}' to footer status bar between cost display
  and keyboard hint section, in both long and short footer variants
- Only shown when git_branch is Some

src/interactive/tests.rs (6 tests):
- git_branch_normal_ref: 'ref: refs/heads/main' → Some("main")
- git_branch_feature_branch: nested ref path → Some("feature/add-auth")
- git_branch_detached_head: raw SHA → Some("abc1234") (7-char short)
- git_branch_not_a_repo: no .git dir → None
- git_branch_malformed_head: garbage content → None
- git_branch_empty_head: empty file → None

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
